commands: emote looks at his minions and growls, 'get to work, bitches!'
name: Harem Master - 26706

arglist: A fat harem master looks at his minions and growls, 'get to work, bitches!'
name: Slaves Bow - 26701-26704

commands: emote screams loudly, 'HELP ME, MY SLAVES!'
name: Master Needs Assist - 26706

arglist: A fat harem master screams loudly, 'HELP ME, MY SLAVES!'
name: Slaves Assist Master - 26701-26704

commands:
set actor %random.char%
if %actor.is_pc%
  mfollow %actor%
  say Ho ho, hee hee, %actor.name% you are sooo funneeee!
  %send% %actor% %self.name% looks at you with the cutest expression.
  %echoaround% %actor% %self.name% looks at %actor.name% with the cutest expression.
end
name: Tar Baby Follow - 26708

commands:
switch %random.2%
  case 1
    emote utters the words, 'ordalaba'.
    dg_cast 'energy drain' %actor%
  break
  case 2
    emote evilly grins and snaps his hands.
    dg_cast 'animate dead' corpse
    order followers assist
  break
  default
  break
done
name: Grand Inquisitor - 26719

commands:
switch %random.2%
  case 1
    emote utters the words, 'ordalaba'.
    dg_cast 'charm' %actor%
  break
  case 2
    emote waves $s hands in a swirling motion.
    dg_cast 'earthquake'
  break
  default
  break
done
name: High Priest of Terror - 26714

commands:
* Near Death Trap stuns actor
wait 3 sec
set stunned %actor.hitp%
%damage% %actor% %stunned%
wait 3 sec
%send% %actor% The Gods allow your puny existence to continue.
name: Near Death Trap - 26744
